verdict.summary: robot_state_publisher receives joint states for joints not defined in the URDF. Joint names don't match.

dead_ends.action: Rename joints in joint_states topic without updating URDF
dead_ends.why_fails: Creates inconsistency; TF tree publishes wrong transforms for renamed joints

dead_ends.action: Suppress the warning and ignore missing joints
dead_ends.why_fails: TF tree will be incomplete; downstream nodes (navigation, manipulation) will fail

workarounds.action: Verify joint names match between URDF and joint_state_publisher
workarounds.how: ros2 topic echo /joint_states --once  # compare joint names with URDF

workarounds.action: Check URDF joint names with check_urdf
Ensure hardware driver publishes the exact joint names from URDF

leads_to.condition: Missing joints mean missing TF frames

preceded_by.condition: URDF modifications may change joint names
